title: CSIR Structural Engineering Research Centre
description: ***.res.in zoominfo.com/c/csir-structural-engineering-research-centre/372543677 CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC), a premier national laboratory established in 1965 and located in Chennai, India.Operating under the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research, the institute is dedicated to advanced research in structural engineering, materials science, and structural health monitoring.The center plays a crucial role in developing innovative construction technologies and providing specialized testing services to support India's infrastructure development
